name: Cloud Soufflé
method: Serve it as a lunch dish with just a green salad and some crunchy bread.
Preheat the oven to 200°C (gas mark 6). Butter an individual ramekin per person (about 15 cm in diameter).
Bake in the oven for 6–8 minutes. The top should be lightly golden, and when you break the crust, the yolks and cream should be soft and hot.
Serve with crusty bread to dip into the yolks and cream.
